blocking_stage: Phase 2/3 app chain validation on real device

findings.reason: Real-device mock GPS can be injected after map tap then Start mocking.
After 定位 and stability wait, UI remains on 北京/茉藜园-东北门 instead of the mocked Shanghai point, so pickup extraction would be untrustworthy.
AMap home receives mock GPS, but taxi-service entry shows a mandatory phone-login wall under the no-login contract.
